name: azdo
description: Azure DevOps Model Context Protocol server with skills for work-item read, create, comment, and sprint reporting.

AZDO_PAT.title: Personal Access Token
AZDO_PAT.description: PAT with Work Items (Read & Write), Project & Team (Read), and optionally Extension Data (Read) for sprint-goal ingestion. Stored in the system keychain.

AZDO_USER_EMAIL.title: User email
AZDO_USER_EMAIL.description: Email associated with the PAT, used by skills that resolve @Me identity.

AZDO_DEFAULT_PROJECT.title: Default project
AZDO_DEFAULT_PROJECT.description: Project name used when a tool call does not specify one.

AZDO_DEFAULT_TEAM.title: Default team
AZDO_DEFAULT_TEAM.description: Team name used for team-relative WIQL such as @CurrentIteration.
